highlights.text: I wrote on Wednesday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Short term though, the loss of 6847 could provoke a dip….
I wrote yesterday: “My general lean is bulls can do some back-testing.
Remember institutions accumulate via Failed Breakdowns.

I wrote last Thursday at 4pm: “It is much smarter to wait for the Failed Breakdown of the October 22nd 6690 low.” We got this at 1:21PM last Friday and we began what ended up being a 200+ point leg higher into this weeks 6900 high.
This flush continued elevator down into this morning.

Readers know though - because I say it 5x a day - that after every every elevator down sell in ES comes an equally violent squeeze but the catch is we need to wait for the trigger: A Failed Breakdown.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the final big long setup we had on Tuesday that took us into the weekly high (Failed Breakdown) and then the short setup that took us lower yesterday.

post_title: SPX Bulls Bought The Dip Today After Biggest Sell Since Oct 10th. Is The Low In? Nov 17 Plan
